name: Best Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add eggs and crushed bananas to the mixture. Mix well.
3. Sift flour, baking soda, and salt into a separate bowl.
4. Gradually add the sifted ingredients to the creamed mixture, stirring gently.
5. Stir in vanilla extract.
6. Pour batter into a greased and floured loaf pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 60 minutes.
8. Allow to cool before serving. Keeps well when refrigerated. Yield: 1 Loaf.
